chunks.text: College of Engineering Department of Electrical Engineering & Computer Science Instructional Support Group /share/b/pub/Summer_Session April 2016 Notes for Summer Session Instructors ~~~~~~

Notes for Summer Session Instructors ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ We manage the computers, software, accounts and cardkey access for students and instructors in the EECS instructional labs. Please Contact us at inst@eecs.berkeley.e

labs. Please Contact us at inst@eecs.berkeley.edu. Please see http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/ for more information. Kevin Mullally Manager, EECS Instructional Support 378 Cory, 643-6141, kevinm@eecs.berkeley.edu
